name: subshare-platform
description: 订阅共享平台（GamsGo 同类）Monorepo：server(NestJS) + web(React 用户前台) + admin(React 管理后台)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w web run dev" "npm -w admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w web run build && npm -w admin run build
